The '''Shrag Brothers''' were sneak-thieves on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] around the time of the [[Battle of Calamari]]. They were known to strip [[Seltiss-2 caravel|Hutt Caravels]] to earn [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].
